name: BRENDA_get_km
description: Get Km (Michaelis constant) values from BRENDA enzyme database. Km indicates substrate affinity - lower Km means higher affinity. Returns values in mM with organism and substrate information. Requires free BRENDA account (register at brenda-enzymes.org/register.php).

ec_number.description: EC number (e.g., 1.1.1.1 for alcohol dehydrogenase, 2.7.1.1 for hexokinase)

enzyme_id.description: Alias for ec_number. Enzyme identifier in EC notation (e.g., 1.1.1.1).

name: BRENDA_get_kcat
description: Get kcat (turnover number) values from BRENDA enzyme database. kcat is the maximum number of substrate molecules converted to product per enzyme per second. Returns values in 1/s. Requires free BRENDA account.

enzyme_id.description: Alias for ec_number. Enzyme identifier in EC notation (e.g., 1.1.1.1).

name: BRENDA_get_inhibitors
description: Get enzyme inhibitor data from BRENDA. Returns inhibitor names and Ki (inhibition constant) values in mM with organism information. Lower Ki means more potent inhibition. Requires free BRENDA account (register at brenda-enzymes.org/register.php).

enzyme_id.description: Alias for ec_number. Enzyme identifier in EC notation (e.g., 1.1.1.1).

name: BRENDA_get_enzyme_info
description: Get general enzyme information from BRENDA by EC number. Returns enzyme name, systematic name, and catalyzed reaction. Requires free BRENDA account (register at brenda-enzymes.org/register.php).

enzyme_id.description: Alias for ec_number. Enzyme identifier in EC notation (e.g., 1.1.1.1).

name: BRENDA_get_enzyme_kinetics
description: Get comprehensive enzyme kinetic parameters WITHOUT requiring BRENDA credentials. Retrieves enzyme identity (name, catalytic activity, alternative names) from ExPASy ENZYME and kinetic parameters (Km, kcat, Ki, Vmax, kcat/Km) from SABIO-RK. If BRENDA credentials are set (BRENDA_EMAIL, BRENDA_PASSWORD), additionally fetches optimal pH, optimal temperature, and specific activity from BRENDA. Accepts EC number (e.g., 1.1.1.1) or enzyme name (e.g., alcohol dehydrogenase). Returns aggregated summary statistics across all reported values plus individual measurements with substrate specificity and organism information.

ec_number.description: EC number (e.g., 1.1.1.1 for alcohol dehydrogenase, 2.7.1.1 for hexokinase, 3.4.21.5 for thrombin)

enzyme_name.description: Enzyme common name. Will be resolved to EC number via UniProt. Examples: alcohol dehydrogenase, hexokinase, lactate dehydrogenase, thrombin

organism.description: Optional organism filter (e.g., Homo sapiens, Escherichia coli, Saccharomyces cerevisiae)

enzyme_id.description: Alias for ec_number. Enzyme identifier in EC notation.

limit.description: Maximum number of SABIO-RK kinetic law entries to retrieve (default 20)

kinetic_parameters.description: Individual kinetic law entries from SABIO-RK

parameter_summary.description: Aggregated statistics for Km, kcat, Ki, Vmax across all entries

ph_optima.description: Optimal pH values (BRENDA only, requires credentials)

temperature_optima.description: Optimal temperature values (BRENDA only, requires credentials)

specific_activity.description: Specific activity values (BRENDA only, requires credentials)
